context: Enterprise multi-cloud Vault setup with Terraform/OpenTofu

checklist.description: Provider configured with auth_login block using approle path

checklist.name: KV v2 secrets engine mounted
checklist.description: vault_mount resource for KV v2 at 'secret' path

checklist.name: AWS secrets engine configured
checklist.description: vault_aws_secret_backend and role for dynamic IAM credentials

checklist.name: AppRole auth method enabled with role
Kubernetes auth method enabled with role
Least-privilege policies created
checklist.description: Separate policies for admin, app-read, and ci-deploy use cases

checklist.name: No hardcoded secrets in code
checklist.description: Uses variables or environment variables, no plain text tokens/passwords
